languages.text: "Даже не думай, губернатор. В Империуме ножей из ксеносов не делают".

traits.locale_text: "Даже не думай, губернатор. В Империуме ножей из ксеносов не делают".

languages.text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."
languages.original_text: "Даже не думай, губернатор. В Империуме ножей из ксеносов не делают".

traits.locale_text: "Don't even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades made of xenos."
"Don't even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades made of xenos."
"Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."
"Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

languages.text: “想都别想，总督。在帝国疆域内，我们可不会用异形的东西锻造刀剑。”
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: “想都别想，总督。在帝国疆域内，我们可不会用异形的东西锻造刀剑。”

languages.text: "Aklından bile geçirme Vali. İmparatorluk'ta zenolardan bıçak yapmayız."
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Aklından bile geçirme Vali. İmparatorluk'ta zenolardan bıçak yapmayız."

languages.text: « N'y songez même pas, gouverneur. Dans l'Imperium, nous ne fabriquons pas d'armes à partir de restes de xénos. »
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: « N'y songez même pas, gouverneur. Dans l'Imperium, nous ne fabriquons pas d'armes à partir de restes de xénos. »

languages.text: «Ni se le ocurra, gobernador. En el Imperium no forjamos espadas con los xenos».
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: «Ni se le ocurra, gobernador. En el Imperium no forjamos espadas con los xenos».

languages.text: "Denkt nicht einmal daran. Im Imperium schmücken wir uns nicht mit Klingen von Xenos."
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Denkt nicht einmal daran. Im Imperium schmücken wir uns nicht mit Klingen von Xenos."

languages.text: 「考えもすまい、総督。帝国では異種族の金属で刃を鍛えることは許されない」
languages.original_text: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."

traits.locale_text: 「考えもすまい、総督。帝国では異種族の金属で刃を鍛えることは許されない」
